title: Flodesk vs Customer.io (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Flodesk vs Customer.io: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Flodesk and Customer.io comes down to your specific use case. Flodesk is built for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while Customer.io targets product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

comparison_table.tool_b: Product And Growth Teams Sending Behaviour-Triggered Messages

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Flodesk wins for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while Customer.io is stronger for product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Flodesk or Customer.io?
faq.a: Flodesk starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Customer.io to Flodesk?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
